productDisplayName: Puma Men Basket Clean Black Casual Shoes
description: The Basket Clean shoes from puma are a part of the Basket Classics from the puma archives. First launched in 1971, this all-time classic retro-style will never go out of date. The leather upper provides comfort and durability, while the rubber outsole offers absolute grip, making it a great buy.  UpperLeather upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays Lacing system for a snug, customised FitStitched upper for enhanced durability Lightly padded collar for a snug fit Perforations on the medial side for breathability MidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTextured rubber outsole for durability and traction
